interaction_phrase: available to users through Amazon Braket
occurrence_sentence: Rigetti Computing, a leading provider of integrated quantum computing systems, today announced that its quantum computers will be available to users through Amazon Braket, a new, fully managed Amazon Web Services (AWS) solution that allows scientists, researchers, and developers to begin experimenting with computers from quantum hardware providers in a single place.
Rigetti has also joined the AWS Partner Network (APN) as a solutions provider working with enterprise customers to develop quantum computing applications.
